Last week the Rossland mines
shipped 7179 tons of ore. Thus far
this year 90.046 tons have been
shipped.


Valuable placer claims were recent
ly found on the Fraser river. The
amount cleaned UP Is said to DO from
SIS to $40 a day.


The Iron Mask has proved itself
to be an excellent mine. The report
from the management says: Sixty
five hundred tons of high grade ore
IL in sight with a gross value of
5000, 900"


The tunnel on the Blue Jay Is now
driven about 100 feet. 1t Is expected
that the ledge will be struck with
another 30 feet of work. The prop
srty Is under the management of Ed
wards & Morrison.


Jay p. Graves states that the ex-
periments on the concentration OF
ore from the RoclSland are very sue
cassful. This mine is situated In the
neiRhborhood of Lake SLOGAN and is
one of the Red Mountain gold copper
properties. The owners are Jay p.
Graves and Frank Watson OF Spo-
kane and w. w. Spinks of Vermont,
d. G.
